abstract: Submit a report with corrections if you find errors in, or have adjustments to, a successfully submitted transaction.
overview:
## Overview

If you successfully submit a report to the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Send-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint that you later find to be incorrect, you must correct your submission. To send a correction, fill out the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/ExternalPurchaseReport] request body with a new [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/requestIdentifier] and the corrections, and call the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Send-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint. Send corrected reports promptly.

There are two types of corrections:

### Correct data in a line item

To submit a line item with corrections, use the line item’s original [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/lineItemId] and include the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/restatement] flag set to `true`. Make corrections to any type of line item: [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/OneTimeBuyLineItem], [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/SubscriptionBuyLineItem], and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/RefundLineItem].

Apple uses only the most recent version of the line item.

### Retract an erroneously submitted line item

If you submitted a line item in error and want Apple to ignore it, use the same [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/lineItemId] as in the original submission. Set both the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/restatement] and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/erroneouslySubmitted] fields to `true`. (You may undo this action by submitting the line item again, with [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/restatement] set to `true`, and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/erroneouslySubmitted] set to false.) Be sure to include all of the original line item data fields, and recalculate the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/netAmountTaxExclusive] field to correctly represent the net amount with the erroneously submitted line item accounted for.

Successfully submitting a line item with the `erroneouslySubmitted` flag is an effective “undo” of the original line item.

# Reporting corrections

**Article**

Submit a report with corrections if you find errors in, or have adjustments to, a successfully submitted transaction.

## Overview

If you successfully submit a report to the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Send-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint that you later find to be incorrect, you must correct your submission. To send a correction, fill out the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/ExternalPurchaseReport] request body with a new [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/requestIdentifier] and the corrections, and call the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Send-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint. Send corrected reports promptly.

There are two types of corrections:

- A correction to transaction data in a line item. In this type of correction, you restate the entire line item with corrected data. Apple uses only the most recent submission for the line item.
- A retraction of a line item you previously sent. In this type of correction, you indicate that you erroneously sent the line item, and aren’t including the erroneously-submitted amounts in transaction calculations. Be sure to update the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/netAmountTaxExclusive] field so it represents the correct net amount, tax exclusive, of the transaction.



### Correct data in a line item

To submit a line item with corrections, use the line item’s original [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/lineItemId] and include the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/restatement] flag set to `true`. Make corrections to any type of line item: [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/OneTimeBuyLineItem], [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/SubscriptionBuyLineItem], and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/RefundLineItem].



Apple uses only the most recent version of the line item.

### Retract an erroneously submitted line item

If you submitted a line item in error and want Apple to ignore it, use the same [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/lineItemId] as in the original submission. Set both the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/restatement] and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/erroneouslySubmitted] fields to `true`. (You may undo this action by submitting the line item again, with [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/restatement] set to `true`, and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/erroneouslySubmitted] set to false.) Be sure to include all of the original line item data fields, and recalculate the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/netAmountTaxExclusive] field to correctly represent the net amount with the erroneously submitted line item accounted for.

Successfully submitting a line item with the `erroneouslySubmitted` flag is an effective “undo” of the original line item.

## External purchase report transactions

- **Reporting tokens with transactions**: Create reports for external purchase tokens that result in completed transactions, including one-time charges, subscriptions and renewals, and refunds.
- **OneTimeBuyLineItem**: The line item that indicates a one-time charge transaction.
- **RefundLineItem**: The line item that indicates a refund transaction.
- **SubscriptionBuyLineItem**: The line item that indicates a subscription-related event or transaction.
- **Line item fields**: Properties that describe a single transaction or correction in an external purchase report.
